summary: Reliable auto-update in packaged builds, local update testing without a full build.
release_notes: Fixed auto-update never initiating a download in the installed exe — the previous sys.frozen detection is not set by Nuitka, replaced with a build-time IS_PACKAGED flag that is stamped True only in compiled builds.
Build pipeline now stamps IS_PACKAGED into a temporary copy of launcher.py so the source file is never mutated by a local build run.
Set BLITZTRADE_IS_PACKAGED=1 in your shell to enable the full update check → download → replace flow when running from source, without needing a full Nuitka compile.
